query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ms.aluno_id) as total_alunos,
  COUNT(*) as total_sessoes,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT ms.aluno_id), 1) as media_sessoes_por_aluno,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.task_mode IS NOT NULL AND ms.task_mode != 'sem_tarefa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sessoes_com_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.task_status = 'nao_entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tarefas_pendentes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.task_status = 'entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tarefas_entregues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.task_status = 'sem_tarefa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_tarefa
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
